code: import axios from'axios';const BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'http://localhost:3000';export const fetchSkills=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get(`${BASE_URL}/skills/api`);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching skills:',error);return[];}};export const fetchProjects=async()=>{try{const response=await axios.get(`${BASE_URL}/projects/api`);return response.data;}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching projects:',error);return[];}};
